long_description:
Get all nodes memory info in WDC zone1 this is an effort to investigate  the problem documented in CIO-15533: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/CIO-15533.
As part of this ongoing issue we need to collect data  from all the nodes in WDC zone1 for bx3d Elba nodes 

Please follow the below steps:
#Step1: Log into deployer
 
#Step2: gt -Z <mzone number or filename or path/to/mzone-yaml-file.yml>

#Step3: Clone Repo 
git clone git@github.ibm.com:Sanjana-Deepak8/node-info.git

#Step4: cd node-info/

#Step5: copy the node_list.txt attached to the Incident

#Step6: Run the script 
python3 node_info.py

#Step7: zip the logs directory
zip -r wdc1.zip logs

#Step8: Attach the zip file to the incident notes.
Incident source: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/CSRE-8661 - Sanjana Deepak
short_description: Get all nodes memory info in WDC zone1
